# Joshua Solomon

> Marketing Automation & Lifecycle Specialist — CRM, Email & SMS Systems. Based in Olongapo City, Philippines · works US business hours. Open to full-time remote, contract, or fractional engagements.

Hands-on agency experience building and running lifecycle email and SMS systems on GoHighLevel, Mailchimp, HubSpot, and Kajabi — audience segmentation, automated nurture and retention flows, multi-touch sequences, A/B testing, A2P 10DLC SMS, and deliverability (dedicated sending domains, SPF/DKIM/DMARC). Also ships the custom-coded sites (Cloudflare Pages, React + Vite) and integrations (n8n / Make / Zapier, Claude API) behind them.

## Contact
- Email: solomonjoshua101602@gmail.com
- WhatsApp: +63 961 556 2117
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/joshua-ralph-adrian-solomon-1a0745347/
- GitHub: https://github.com/JoshuaRalphz
- Website: https://solomonjoshua.com

## Capabilities

- **Email & Lifecycle Marketing** — End-to-end lifecycle programs on GoHighLevel, Mailchimp, HubSpot, and Kajabi. Campaign builds, audience segmentation, automated nurture and retention flows, multi-touch sequences, A/B testing, and open/click/delivery analytics reporting.
- **CRM Configuration & Automation** — GoHighLevel full builds, HubSpot, Mailchimp, Kajabi. Sub-accounts, pipelines, lead routing, booking automations, A2P 10DLC SMS brand approval (the GHL setup most builders avoid), GHL-Gmail-Zapier glue.
- **Deliverability & Compliance** — Dedicated sending subdomains with SPF/DKIM/DMARC aligned, warmup to 6,500+/day verified capacity, A2P 10DLC SMS registration, Square payment integration.
- **Workflow Automation & AI** — n8n self-hosted on DigitalOcean, Make.com + Zapier for connector-heavy SaaS workflows, Anthropic Claude API for personalized outreach + scoring, multi-provider email enrichment. GHL + Canva + Google Sheets API integrations.
- **Custom Sites & Internal Tools** — Hand-coded HTML/CSS/JS on Cloudflare Pages, React + Vite + Firebase internal tools. Recently built AGC HUB — a custom platform unifying Drive, ClickUp, Trello, GHL, and Canva for a US agency. In daily production.

## Professional Experience

### Implementation Specialist — CRM, Web & Marketing Systems · Arrow Group Consulting (Michigan, USA) · Feb 2026 – Present
Build and run monthly email and SMS marketing campaigns and lifecycle automations across multiple client accounts — audience segmentation, nurture and retention flows — and report open/click/delivery analytics to founder and clients. Own deliverability across the portfolio (dedicated sending domains, SPF/DKIM/DMARC, A2P 10DLC registration). Configure GoHighLevel sub-accounts end-to-end. Built AGC HUB — a custom internal platform (React + Vite + Firebase + GHL/Canva/Google Sheets APIs) unifying a scattered tool stack. Technical advisor to clients and the founder.

### Virtual Marketing Assistant — Doneverse (Philippines VMA agency) · Sep 2025 – Feb 2026
Built and shipped Mailchimp and HubSpot email marketing systems for SMB clients — automated onboarding sequences, nurture flows, and Kajabi course-platform integrations. Ran multi-touch LinkedIn outreach and follow-up sequences. Owned client onboarding including domain configuration and email deliverability setup. Delivered Wix Studio sites with integrated Square payment processing.

## Real Client Work (delivered under Arrow Group Consulting, shown with permission)

- **AGC HUB** (internal agency PWA) — Custom React + Vite + Firebase PWA unifying Drive, ClickUp, Trello, GHL, and Canva into one platform for content production workflow. Multi-API orchestration. In daily production. Not publicly accessible — internal company tool, walkthrough available on request.
- **Bishop Roofing & Exteriors** (demo build) — Fictional Texas roofing client, real working build. 6-page custom-coded site + GHL CRM + A2P-compliant SMS + dedicated email sending domain + interactive in-browser GHL backend demo. https://bishoproofing.company
- **Alpha Omega Utility Services** (Michigan) — Full marketing stack including A2P 10DLC brand approval on GoHighLevel. https://www.aoutilityservices.com
- **HOME.FM** (Spring Arbor, MI radio station) — Dedicated email-sending infrastructure (subdomain mail.listenhome.fm, SPF/DKIM/DMARC aligned, SSL issued, warmup to 6,500 emails/day capacity). https://www.home.fm
- **Alliance Service Brands** (Jackson, MI) — Custom multi-brand site unifying 6 specialized brands. https://www.allianceservicebrands.com
- **Endtime Entrepreneurs** (USA) — Built full Cloudflare Pages site from scratch + GHL CRM + DistroKid music distribution + ongoing SEO. https://endtimeentrepreneurs.com
- **Ada's Closet** (Spring Arbor, MI) — Custom Google Apps Script back-office for a student-run consignment startup, multi-platform listing flow across Poshmark/eBay/Depop. https://www.adasclosetsau.com
- **TrueCare Chiropractic** (Lansing, MI) — Email marketing, ongoing site maintenance, SEO, planned Cloudflare migration. https://www.truecarechiro.com

## Education

- **BS Computer Science** — Gordon College, Olongapo City (2021 – 2025). Thesis: "DevPath: Bridging Students to Learning Opportunities through On-Demand Webinars and Certifications." Published at IRCITE 2025 — Bulacan State University.

## Communication Style

Async-first. Strong written communication for distributed teams. Comfortable speaking directly with founders and senior stakeholders. Reply time typically under 24 hours during US business hours.
